intent: Prepare a QCW 808 diode stack RFQ for Nd:YAG vendor outreach.
acceptance_criteria: Compiler routes RFQ request toward technical documentation or flags missing registry coverage.
Generated plan includes parameter extraction, vendor message drafting and spec review.
Review report identifies missing technical parameters before release.
nexus_integration_notes: Nexus can dispatch this to a document writer agent plus a technical review agent.
Runtime should return the RFQ draft and a missing-parameters checklist.
